title: cytisus scoparius subsp. maritimus
intro: Cytisus scoparius subsp. maritimus, also known as sea broom or maritime broom, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of sea broom include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Sea broom can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including tea, tincture, and infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
